mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND openid = #{openid} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user`(store_id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar, phone, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET phone = #{phone}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE `user`
unionid = #{unionid},
nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar},
phone = #{phone},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND store_id = #{storeId}
AND (phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR openid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
